articles.title: Stocks Fall Even as Oil Slides on US-Iran Talks: Markets Wrap

articles.title: France, Germany Agree on Stakes in Tankmaker KNDS Before IPO

articles.title: China Lays Out Blueprint to Boost Consumption of Clean Energy
articles.summary: China has laid out broad new rules that mandate increased use of renewables as it continues to shift the focus of its energy transition from building new generation to ensuring it gets consumed.

articles.title: Lithium Plunges in China on Speculation Over Status of CATL Mine
